description: Group ID and other information about the next script to be run.
name: lsst.sal.ScriptQueue.logevent_nextVisit

fields.description: SAL index (only present for indexed SAL components)
fields.name: salIndex

fields.description: Time of instance publication
fields.name: private_sndStamp

fields.description: Time of instance reception
fields.name: private_rcvStamp

fields.description: UTC time for EFD timestamp. An integer (the number of leap seconds) different from private_sndStamp.
fields.name: private_efdStamp

fields.description: TAI time at which the Kafka message was created.
fields.name: private_kafkaStamp

fields.description: Sequence number
fields.name: private_seqNum

fields.description: Revision hashcode
fields.name: private_revCode

fields.description: Identity of publisher: SAL component name for a CSC or user@host for a user
fields.name: private_identity

fields.description: Process ID of publisher
fields.name: private_origin

fields.description: Index of Script SAL component.
fields.name: scriptSalIndex

fields.description: Group ID for images taken by the script.
fields.name: groupId

fields.description: Coordinate system for position. A Script MetadataCoordSys enum. Observed is refracted apparent topocentric, e.g. similar to Mount but the telescope model is applied and the azimuth is wrapped. If None then position should be ignored.
fields.name: coordinateSystem

fields.description: Longitude, latitude axes of position in coordinateSystem
fields.name: position

fields.description: The expected start time for this visit (TAI).
fields.name: startTime

fields.description:
Rotation system for cameraAngle, a Script MetadataRotSys enum
        * None: The camera rotator is not used; ignore cameraAngle.
        * Sky: Position angle of focal plane +Y, measured from N through E.
          At 0 degrees, +Y is along N and +X is along E/W depending on handedness.
          At 90 degrees, +Y is along E and +X is along S/N depending on handedness.
        * Horizon: Position angle of focal plane +Y, measured from +Alt through +Az.
          At 0 degrees, +Y is along +Alt and +X is along +/-Az, depending on handedness.
          At 90 degrees, +Y is along +Az and +X is along -/+Alt, depending on handedness.
        * Mount: The position sent to the instrument rotator; the details depend on the rotator.
fields.name: rotationSystem

fields.description: Camera angle in rotationSystem
fields.name: cameraAngle

fields.description: Comma-separated names of acceptable filters, or blank for any filter.
fields.name: filters

fields.description: Desired dome state; a Script MetadataDome enum.
fields.name: dome

fields.description: Estimated duration of the script, excluding slewing to the initial position required by the script.
fields.name: duration

fields.description: Predicted number of images to take; 0 if unknown.
fields.name: nimages

fields.description: Instrument name (the short name used by middleware) used to take the data; blank if unknown or not relevant.
fields.name: instrument

fields.description: Survey name.
fields.name: survey

fields.description: Predicted total number of checkpoints that will be seen (counting all repetitions of a repeated checkpoint); 0 if unknown.
fields.name: totalCheckpoints
